guide_gray_garment_bound_edge_under_pres.query: a worker feeds the navy-bound edge of a gray garment under the sewing machine presser foot and guides it with both hands

trim_excess_navy_binding_with_scissors.query: a worker holds the edge of a gray garment with the left hand and uses large reddish-brown scissors in the right hand to cut the protruding navy binding

align_navy_bound_edge.query: a worker pinches the navy-bound edge of a gray garment with both hands and repeatedly repositions their fingers along the edge to straighten it
